attributedDescription.content:
🔥 Preview video for €0.99 → Click 'JOIN' above!

👇 What do you think? Leave a comment!

CREDIT:

https://github.com/deepseek-ai/Engram

⚠️Goodbye NVIDIA: DeepSeek has just published 'Engram,' the paper that makes brute force obsolete. It's not a bigger model; it's a Conditional Memory architecture that breaks the computing bottleneck. In this video, we break down the O(1) search, the 20% increase in reasoning, and why this technology threatens Western hardware dominance.

Goodbye NVIDIA: DeepSeek Achieves Infinite Memory

👁️ DISCLAIMER
This video illustrates the latest advances in AI-based robotics, its capabilities, and its growing role in everyday life.

message.simpleText: Adiós ChatGPT: Google Revela su AGI
Elon Musk ADVIERTE: "Grok 5 alcanzará la AGI en 2026"

comments.text:
Y aquí está la razón de porque casi dejaron de producir memoria RAM doméstica, para enfocarse en la de servidor. 
Quanta memoria podía tener lo que saco Nvidia en el CES? CPU vera con 330 teras de RAM, creo recordar. 
Gracias a deepseek por hacerlo público
